Reflections.

visibility Public
Category: General
calendar_today Created: July 21, 2024
update Updated: April 17, 2026
menu_book 4 chapters
visibility 2,337 views
David John Michael Daniel Dvorak and David John Rush-Cook Dvorak were two almost twelve-year-old boys living in Interesting Times in parallel universes. They were never supposed to be aware of the other's existence, until something swapped them to each other's world. How is a boy unknown outside of one Chicago suburb supposed to be a champion for the Chosen One? And how is a boy who had never left Illinois and only heard of magic the morning he woke up in Surrey supposed to protect the Boy Who Lived? (This is a character study based on other stories I'm writing. There is a plot, though.

Third Time's a Soul Bond?

visibility Public
Category: Harry/Ron
calendar_today Created: February 4, 2018
update Updated: December 14, 2023
menu_book 14 chapters
visibility 8,742 views
After the Girl Who Conquered's girlfriend ambushed DOM Battle Mage Ron Weasley, he'd hoped he was back in his original world, even with starting from conception yet again. But he discovered that he should have learned a LOT more about that magical mystery, the Soul Bond. Now, while dealing with four Soul Bonds, he has the future of the wizarding world both in his hands and between his legs. He is now the chosen one of a "Chosen One" far stronger yet far more fragile than he'd ever imagined. The prophecy only said "The one with the power to vanquish the Dark Lord approaches," not that he'd win.
